overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a female character walking through a sunlit Mediterranean-style urban environment with distinctive dark angular architecture. The character navigates from a corridor with modernist buildings into a wider palm-lined boulevard, with game UI prompts visible at the bottom of the screen.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the street with dark angular buildings on the right and vegetation on the left

entered.detail: tall building with dark concrete facade and geometric angular design
rocky formations and boulders lining the edge of the street
tall wall covered with greenery and trees
large tropical banana plant with broad leaves

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit urban street bordered by distinctive dark angular buildings on the right and vegetation walls on the left. The environment features rocky terrain formations at the building bases and tropical plants, with clear blue skies overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza intersection between building corridors

events.description: character turns left at the open plaza intersection to enter a new street

agents.ego_description: turning left at the plaza intersection to change direction

entered.detail: wide open paved area at the intersection of multiple streets
tall multi-story residential building visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character reaches an open plaza intersection and turns left, transitioning from the narrow corridor into a wider area. An apartment tower becomes visible in the distance ahead as the dark buildings of the previous street fall behind.

agents.ego_description: walking down the palm-tree lined street toward distant buildings

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining both sides of the boulevard
tall palm trees lining both sides of the boulevard
large rocky formations and boulders along the right side

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a sunlit boulevard lined with palm trees on both sides. Rocky outcrops line the right side of the street while residential buildings and a distant apartment tower dominate the view ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow urban corridor that gradually opens into a wide, palm-lined boulevard. It begins with the character walking along a sunlit street bordered by dark angular buildings and lush vegetation walls set against a clear blue sky. As the character reaches an open plaza intersection and turns left, the restrictive walls of the corridor fall away to reveal a more expansive urban layout. The scene then shifts into a broad boulevard where the dark architecture is replaced by rows of palm trees and rocky outcrops. Finally, the camera proceeds forward toward a distant apartment tower that dominates the horizon of the residential district.
